s1.ptxt: Using ohmmeter (1), check for continuity between slip rings (2) of rotor. If there is no continuity, replace rotor.

spec.title: Standard resistance between slip rings of rotor

s1.ptxt: Using ohmmeter (1), check that there is no continuity between slip ring (2) and rotor core (3). If there is continuity, replace rotor.
Check slip rings for roughness or scoring. If rough or scored, replace rotor.

servinfosub.title: Bearing
servinfosub.ptxt: If any abnormality is found, replace bearing.

s1.ptxt: Using ohmmeter (1), check all leads (2) for continuity. If there is no continuity, replace stator.
Using ohmmeter (1), check that there is no continuity between coil leads (2) and stator core (3). If there is continuity, replace stator.

servinfosub.title: Brush and Brush Holder
servinfosub.ptxt: Check each brush (1) for wear by measuring its length as shown. If brush has worn down to service limit, replace brushes.

servinfosub.title: Rectifier
servinfosub.ptxt: Using ohmmeter, check continuity between “B” terminal (1) or “E” terminal (2) and each diode lead (3). Check both directions by reversing probes of ohmmeter and there should be only one-way continuity in each case. If check result is not satisfactory, replace rectifier (4).

attention3.ptxt: If multifunctional tester is used, choose its diode range for this check.
